name: rival-search-mcp
description: 9 research tools: 5-engine web search, 9 social platforms, 5 news sources, 5 academic databases, GitHub, website mapping, document analysis, and research topic synthesis. No API keys required. Deterministic outputs for agent chaining.

interface.longDescription: Multi-engine web research across 5 search engines, 9 social platforms, 5 news sources, 5 academic databases, GitHub, website mapping, document analysis, and research topic synthesis. No API keys required.
defaultPrompt: Search the web for current information.
Research a topic and summarize sources.
Find scientific papers about a subject.
